title: BeeFree
description: Makes changes to Bees and Weather for modpacks with lots of rain or snow.
body:
Adds 3 configurable options per-world (`WORLDFOLDER`/serverconfig/beefreeforge-server.toml):

- `wetsnow`: Makes entities that take damage from rain also take damage from snow.
- `rainhurtsbees`: Makes bees take damage from rain. `wetsnow` will also apply to bees due to this, if this is enabled.
- `ignorantbees`: Makes bees ignore weather when entering or leaving the hive. If you are also using `rainhurtsbees` at the same time, bees will not exit the hive if the block above the hive can see the sky.
